2605.27365.title: LocateAnything: Fast and High-Quality Vision-Language Grounding with Parallel Box Decoding
2605.27365.paper_summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) commonly formulate visual grounding and detection as a coordinate-token generation problem, serializing each 2D box into multiple 1D tokens that are learned and decoded largely independently. This token-by-token decoding mismatches the coupled structure of box geometry and creates a practical inference bottleneck due to strictly sequential generation. We introduce LocateAnything, a unified generative grounding and detection framework based on Parallel Box Decoding (PBD). By decoding geometric elements such as bounding boxes and points as atomic units in a single step, LocateAnything preserves intra-box geometric coherence and unlocks substantial parallelism. We show that PBD improves both decoding throughput and localization accuracy. We further develop a scalable data engine and curate LocateAnything-Data, a large-scale dataset with more than 138 million training samples, substantially increasing data diversity for high-precision localization. Extensive evaluations show that LocateAnything advances the speed-accuracy frontier, achieving significantly higher decoding throughput while improving high-IoU localization quality across diverse benchmarks. The results highlight the complementary benefits of Parallel Box Decoding and large-scale training data in enabling efficient and precise unified visual grounding and detection.
2605.27365.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）通常將視覺定位和檢測表述為一個坐標-標記生成問題，將每個2D框序列化為多個獨立學習和解碼的1D標記。這種逐個標記的解碼與框幾何的耦合結構不匹配，並且由於嚴格的序列生成，造成了實際推斷的瓶頸。我們引入了LocateAnything，一個基於平行框解碼（PBD）的統一生成定位和檢測框架。通過將邊界框和點等幾何元素作為原子單元在單一步驟中解碼，LocateAnything保留了框內的幾何一致性，並解鎖了大量的並行性。我們展示了PBD在解碼吞吐量和定位準確性方面的提升。我們進一步開發了一個可擴展的數據引擎，並策劃了LocateAnything-Data，一個擁有超過1.38億訓練樣本的大規模數據集，顯著增加了高精度定位的數據多樣性。廣泛的評估顯示，LocateAnything推進了速度-準確性邊界，在各種基準中實現了顯著更高的解碼吞吐量，同時提高了高IoU定位質量。結果突顯了平行框解碼和大規模訓練數據在實現高效且精確的統一視覺定位和檢測方面的互補優勢。
2605.27365.author: Shihao Wang et.al.
2605.27365.authors: Shihao Wang, Shilong Liu, Yuanguo Kuang, Xinyu Wei, Yangzhou Liu, Zhiqi Li, Yunze Man, Guo Chen, Andrew Tao, Guilin Liu, Jan Kautz, Lei Zhang, Zhiding Yu
